positive: A stylized, central composition featuring a group of friendly, diverse forest creatures (fox, owl, squirrel, deer) gathered together in a harmonious circle. They are rendered in a whimsical, hand-drawn illustration style with thick outlines and flat, vibrant colors, reminiscent of modern children's book art. The background should be simplified and nature-themed, using repeating leaf patterns or dappled light effects. Strong silhouette focus on the animals, perfect for apparel printing. Composition should feel joyful, inviting, and magical. Lighting is bright and airy, emphasizing natural contrast.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, low quality, bad anatomy, noise, extra limbs, disfigured, grain, poorly drawn hands, deep shadows, monochrome, grayscale, overly detailed background
